heading: Omitted
label: 1300g–6 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which prohibited gaming activities prohibited by the laws of the State of Texas on the reservation and on lands of the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–89, title I, § 107101 Stat. 668Aug. 18, 1987
